name: chrome-devtools
description: Chrome DevTools MCP bridge scaffold for the edgars-mcp plugin registry.

interface.shortDescription: Chrome DevTools MCP preset for local browser debugging.
interface.longDescription: Launches the official Chrome DevTools MCP server with Windows-safe defaults for local browser automation, debugging, screenshots, and performance investigation.
defaultPrompt: Use Chrome DevTools to inspect the current page console errors.
Record a quick performance trace for this page.
Open Chrome and verify the target flow visually.
